name: token-economy
description: Token/context-efficient skills for AI coding agents. 16 skills across output style, planning, lean execution, verification, wiki memory (write-gate / wiki-refresh / provenance trust), unified handoff, prompt triage, PreCompact extraction, semantic AST diff, output filtering, retrieval indexing, and drift mitigation. Measured per-skill savings range from ~-20% (routing) to ~-97% (re-reads / compaction) depending on skill type; see eval/FINDINGS.md.
author: Saar Shai

plugins.name: token-economy
plugins.description: All 16 skills bundled. skill-pulse and compliance-canary are opt-in (auto-install: false) — installed but not auto-wired.

hooks.description: prompt-triage classifier; opt-in via plugin config.
